summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SIMPLIFIED PromoBundle feature for AVO JERSEYS. Focus on MOBILE experience (390x844 viewport). All 8 test cases PASSED. Key changes from previous version: removed name/number/patches customization, kept only Team, Kit, Season, Size for main + National team, Size for free product.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified PromoBundle tested on mobile and desktop. Key findings: 1) Mobile layout single column with touch-friendly buttons ✓, 2) Native dropdown selects work (appearance: auto) ✓, 3) Season/Kit/Size buttons tappable ✓, 4) Inline product images display when team+season+kit selected ✓, 5) National team image displays inline ✓, 6) PromoPopup bottom sheet on mobile (items-end), centered on desktop (items-center) ✓, 7) Cart shows BUNDLE 1+1 badge + main product image + GRATIS free product image ✓, 8) Desktop works correctly ✓

mobile_layout.details: Single column layout, touch-friendly buttons, clean mobile-first design

mobile_dropdown_selects.details: Team select has appearance:auto allowing native mobile picker, no appearance-none

mobile_kit_buttons.details: First Kit, Second Kit, Third Kit buttons tappable with checkmark indicator

mobile_size_buttons.details: S, M, L, XL, XXL buttons for both main and free products working

main_product_inline_image.details: Product image displays inline with aspect-[4/5] object-contain when team+season+kit selected

free_product_inline_image.details: National team product image displays inline when national team selected

promo_popup_bottom_sheet.details: Mobile: items-end positions popup at bottom (popup_bottom=844=viewport_height). Desktop: items-center positions popup centered (popup_center=540=viewport_center)

cart_bundle_display.details: BUNDLE 1+1 badge visible, main product with image, GRATIS label with free product image

desktop_functionality.details: Desktop /promotii page works correctly with same functionality as mobile

screenshots: .screenshots/02_mobile_main_product.png - Main product with image after selection
.screenshots/08_mobile_popup_bottom_sheet.png - Popup as bottom sheet on mobile

new_features: Inline product images for both selections
